title: Pentacalia diplostephioides
taxonomy: Pentacalia diplostephioides is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Pentacalia, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical regions. Pentacalia diplostephioides is further classified as part of the tribe Senecioneae, which includes a diverse range of daisy-like plants. The species is typically found in regions with high humidity and moderate temperatures. The classification of Pentacalia diplostephioides is based on its morphological characteristics and phylogenetic relationships with other species in the Asteraceae family.
